---
title: "Types of Models"
engine: knitr
filters:
  - interactive-duckdb
databases:
  - name: cookbook
    path: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Alaburda/data-analyst-sql-cookbook/master/databases/cookbook.duckdb"
    format: duckdb
---

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(duckdb)

con <- dbConnect(duckdb(), "../databases/cookbook.duckdb", read_only = TRUE)

```

## Dimensions

### Type 1 dimensions

### Type 2 dimensions

## Facts

### Snapshot facts / Factless facts

### Transactional fact tables

### Periodic snapshot fact tables

### Accumulating fact tables

https://brazenly.blogspot.com/2015/02/datawarehouse-dimensional-modeling_12.html

## Bridge tables
